name: Gwangju Shinsegae Co., Ltd.
summary: Gwangju Shinsegae Co., Ltd. operates department stores under the E-Mart name in South Korea. The company was formerly known as Gwangju Shinsegae Department Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Gwangju Shinsegae Co., Ltd. in 2006. Gwangju Shinsegae Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Gwangju, South Korea.
